recommendations.title: Daniel Isn't Real
recommendations.overview: A troubled college freshman resurrects his imaginary friend to help him cope with a violent trauma.

recommendations.title: Max Steel
recommendations.overview: The adventures of teenager Max McGrath and alien companion Steel, who must harness and combine their tremendous new powers to evolve into the turbo-charged superhero Max Steel.

recommendations.director: Rodney Rothman, Peter Ramsey, Bob Persichetti

recommendations.title: Brightburn
recommendations.overview: What if a child from another world crash-landed on Earth, but instead of becoming a hero to mankind, he proved to be something far more sinister?

recommendations.title: The Voyagers
recommendations.overview: Time jump to 1939 with teenager Max and his friends as they try to navigate Mussolini's Rome and find Max's missing brother.

recommendations.title: Collateral
recommendations.overview: Cab driver Max picks up a man who offers him $600 to drive him around. But the promise of easy money sours when Max realizes his fare is an assassin.
